arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man Utd Face Challenge From Bundesliga Side for PSG Flop in Transfer Race
arts.sum: With the January transfer window fast approaching, speculation about Randal Kolo Muani’s future at Paris Saint-Germain is intensifying, particularly as his limited playing time continues to attract attention. Since Luis Enrique took charge, Kolo Muani has found it difficult to secure a regular spot as PSG’s No. 9. arts.ttl: Liverpool to Rival Man Utd, PSG in Race for £84M-Rated Wonderkid
arts.sum: Under sporting advisor Luis Campos, Paris Saint-Germain has strengthened its ties with Portugal, signing rising stars like Vitinha, João Neves, and Gonçalo Ramos. Now, PSG seems to be eyeing another exciting talent. Foot Mercato reports that PSG, Manchester City, and Manchester United are closely monitoring 17-year-old Geovany Quenda from Sporting Lisbon. arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Challenge Man City for PSG Summer Transfer Target
arts.sum: This summer, Paris Saint-Germain was among the clubs interested in Sporting Lisbon midfielder Morten Hjulmand. However, the Portuguese side was unwilling to let him go unless his €80 million release clause was met. The 24-year-old played a key role last season, making 49 appearances across all competitions, scoring four goals, and providing four assists.
